title: Midnight Portuguese Almond Pie
description: A traditional Portuguese pie made with almonds and a rich midnight filling, perfect for a sweet dessert.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract.
Melt the butter and chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval.
Combine the melted chocolate mixture with the sugar mixture and mix until smooth.
Stir in the sliced almonds and crushed cookies.
Pour the mixture into a 9-inch pie dish.
Bake for 40-50 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Let cool completely on a wire rack before serving.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serve with whipped cream or vanilla ice cream, if desired.
